scripts.release:supply-chain:check: npm run release:versioning:check && npm run release:reproducibility:check && npm run release:artifacts:check && npm run release:rollout:check
scripts.release:gate: pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r build && npm run lint && npm run check:no-todo
scripts.ops:mobile:c8:local: npm run mobile:c8:evidence:refresh && npm run mobile:accessibility:check:local && npm run mobile:c8:performance:check:local && npm run ops:mobile:c8:snapshot
scripts.ops:sh:smoke:47matrix: wsl sh -lc 'cd /mnt/x/47network/apps/openclaw-sven/sven_v0.1.0 && sh scripts/ops/sh/ops.sh ingress smoke-47matrix'
scripts.ops:sh:quickstart:publish-smoke: wsl sh -lc 'cd /mnt/x/47network/apps/openclaw-sven/sven_v0.1.0 && sh scripts/ops/sh/ops.sh ingress quickstart-publish-smoke'
scripts.ops:sh:systemd:install: wsl sh -lc 'cd /mnt/x/47network/apps/openclaw-sven/sven_v0.1.0 && sh scripts/ops/sh/ops.sh ingress install-systemd-core /opt/sven/app'
scripts.docker:up:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.profiles.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile dev up -d
scripts.docker:up:staging: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.profiles.yml -f docker-compose.staging.yml --profile staging up -d
scripts.docker:up:production: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.profiles.yml -f docker-compose.production.yml --profile production up -d
scripts.release:community:doc-agents:run:strict: npm run release:community:doc-agents:verify && npm run release:community:doc-agents:publish
